organization.name: Gear Up
organization.description: Studio Gear Up B.V. supports companies, governments and other organizations in identifying and creating the best opportunities for achieving the best market or policy position in a low carbon economy context. The core activities of studio Gear Up are strategic consultancy, proces- and projectmanagement and concept development on themes like resource efficiency, value chain and supply chain optimization, biofuels and alternative, low carbon fuels as well as on the biobased and circular economy.
